title: Fix command casing
description: Force-lowercases primary commands while typing them. No more "command not found" from using "/Asdf".
body:
![Shows a command written with CAPS on, but the main command is lowercased.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efea3ce6cae943cd7eaa8ed00e686f50b8b930ad.png)

# Fix command casing

This mod will force your command to be sent in lower-case.  
If you type `//Stack` it will display and send `//stack` instead.  
Arguments of the command are not affected. `/ME HELLO` will turn into `/me HELLO`.

**Warning**: There is no toggle for this feature. If you are on a server which actually has upper-cased commands. May a higher entity help you.

## Why?

Ever since Mojang introduced the updated command framework, I was no longer able to properly use commands. This mod fixes my bad typing habits.

## Support

This mod will rarely see updates. As I only add support for versions which I actually use. That means one of each primary version normally.

I linked Discord. Join and nag me to update the mod - then I'll do it :)
